name: @cinatra-works-after/echo-proof
description: Deterministic no-LLM echo agent fixture for the works-after wayflow proof (scripts/ci/works-after/wayflow.sh). Not a marketplace extension; never published. A StartNode -> OutputMessageNode -> EndNode flow that echoes a nonce, exercising the WayFlow A2A runtime (wayflowcore/pyagentspec/python image) without any LLM or secret.
